calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2019 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-19-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants SVSM Services, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, and Sergii Sopot, an individual.
Dept: 514. Judge: Kathleen A. Kelly. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Proceedings Not Reported.

David P. Wasserman, Esq. appeared for plaintiff 587 Eddy Street, LLC, a California limited liability company.
Fernando Arizaga, General Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants SVSM Services, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, or Sergii Sopot, an individual.
Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on August 29, 2018.
Defendant Sergii Sopot's answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on November 19, 2018.
Default as to defendant SVSM Services, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, was entered on January 15, 2019.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on April 3, 2019, setting trial for today, August 19, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, August 19, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff 587 Eddy Street, LLC, a California limited liability company, and against defendants SVSM Services, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, and Sergii Sopot, an individual, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $155,083.56.
Attorney Fees - $4,700.00.
Costs - $485.00.
Total - $160,268.56.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2019 Set For Trial On Aug-19-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2019 Continued To Apr-17-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2019 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-19-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
